classification: 能動粒子系・情報フィードバック制御の非平衡相転移理論
allowed_public_description: A reduced numerical prototype for ABP-like active particles with information feedback, limited to model-internal kinetic-arrest-like and noise-induced annealing behavior.
allowed_public_description_ja: 情報フィードバック制御を持つABP型能動粒子系の低次元数値プロトタイプ。モデル内のkinetic-arrest様挙動とnoise-induced annealingに限定する。

publication_posture.github: GO after URL replacement; source folder name was normalized away from civilization wording.
